word: H8631 - תְּקֵף - tᵉqêph - tek-afe' - Make firm

sections.paragraph:
Original: תּקף

Transliteration: teqêph

Phonetic: tek-afe'

BDB Definition:

  1. to grow strong, be hardened
    1. (Peal)
      1. to grow strong, be hardened
      2. to grow arrogant (figuratively)
    2. (Pael) to make strong, make firm, make stringent

Origin: corresponding to H8630

TWOT entry: 3065

Part(s) of speech: Verb
